name: Naphtha Israel Petroleum Corp. Ltd.
summary: Naphtha Israel Petroleum Corp. Ltd. engages in the exploration, production, and sale of oil and gas in Israel and the United States. The company offers natural gas and condensate gas. As of December 31, 2015, its property consisted of I/12 Tamar lease, I/13 Dalit lease, 392/ Daniel West license, 391/ Daniel East license, and 1/18 Shimshon lease, as well as a proved reserve of 7,291.3 BCF of natural gas and 9.5 million barrels of gas condensate in Tamar and Tamar reserve SW. The company is also involved in real estate and hotel businesses in Israel, Germany, Hungary, and the Czech Republic. Its customers include electricity companies, industrial customers, and private electricity producers and companies. The company was founded in 1956 and is based in Petah Tikva, Israel. Naphtha Israel Petroleum Corp. Ltd. is a former subsidiary of J.O.E.L. Jerusalem Oil Exploration Ltd.
